title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Menzies Aviation India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Menzies Aviation India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Menzies Aviation India are looking for an experienced Reservation Manager based out of Surat. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Menzies Aviation India:
Menzies Aviation India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Menzies Aviation India!
